body:
Enhanced the two _Import blueprints into a build-ready HARDENING ADDENDUM (layers on top; preserves your design): _PROJECT_KNOWLEDGE_BASE/blueprints/ADVANCED_REGISTER_INDEXER_HARDENING_ADDENDUM_2026-06-14.md. Six additions that close the genuine gaps + reuse code we already built/audited:

H1 AGGREGATE SENSITIVITY (main gap): per-record sensitivity isn't enough — the atlas-as-a-whole is a host security map even fully field-redacted. Add atlas_sensitivity_tier = max(records) bumped when it spans >=2 of {network,services,users,firewall,autostart}; egress guard = atlas/snapshots are LOCAL-ONLY (never published/bridged/exported); bridge carries counts+ProposalRecords only.
H2 STRUCTURAL read-only: ReadOnlyCollector contract = collectors are pure ()->list[Record], import no write/exec/net-mutation; only the redacting indexer writes, path-contained to its own dir (like FileBackedSigmaTransport); mutation lives in a separate capability the indexer can't call (Codex+owner gated).
H3 MANDATORY fail-closed redaction (O-G1 lesson): every record runs contains_secret_shape() after redaction, before index; drop+count if residual. Env values NEVER indexed (names/hash only); cmdlines/exec_start/docker-inspect redaction-verified; journal default OFF.
H4 collectors via SAFE-SHELL ALLOWLIST: reuse the salvaged safe_shell_tool.py pattern (blocked tokens/cmds, mutation gating, readonly allowlist, dry-run); collector commands from a fixed read-only allowlist, no free-form/interpolated shell. Same boundary the executor shell.run needs (O2) - build once.
H5 tamper-evident snapshots: append-only + prev_fingerprint chain + fsync; verify via check_ledger_integrity; broken chain = refuse to diff.

SKILL blueprint hardening: S-H1 egress never auto (no schedule/loop/side-effect; discrete owner-scoped opt-in); S-H2 route web fetch through the platform restricted fetch path (no curl/requests bypass); S-H3 active network inventory = owner per-CIDR, passive-only until then, outputs inherit H1 (network map is local-only too).

All DESIGN_RADAR / build conditions. Net: keep the machine-atlas + web-intel direction; hold the two lines (observe/propose only; maps sensitive in aggregate). Reuses graveyard redaction + ledger chain + safe_shell_tool salvage = low-cost to implement. No gate crossed; design only.
constraints: fail-closed redaction mandatory; env values never indexed
forbidden_actions: build indexer without structural read-only + fail-closed redaction
web/network egress without per-target owner scope
objective: Hardening addendum enhancing the advanced register/indexer + skill blueprints
requested_output: Codex: build indexer to H1-H5 (reuse graveyard redaction + ledger chain + safe_shell_tool). Antigravity: skill stays design until owner-scoped (S-H1..3).
summary: Enhanced the register/indexer + skill blueprints with a 6-point hardening addendum: H1 aggregate-sensitivity (atlas=host security map, local-only), H2 structural read-only collectors, H3 mandatory fail-closed redaction (env values never indexed), H4 collectors via salvaged safe_shell_tool allowlist, H5 tamper-evident snapshot chain; skill: egress never-auto + restricted-fetch + per-CIDR. Reuses graveyard/ledger/safe_shell patterns. DESIGN_RADAR. No gate crossed.
